title: Ukraine Tax Declaration on Property Status and Income — Annex ЄСВ3 (Unified Social Contribution Adjustment Following a Documentary Audit)
description: The State Tax Service of Ukraine's (Державна податкова служба України, DPS) "Додаток ЄСВ3 до податкової декларації про майновий стан і доходи" (Annex ЄСВ3 to the Tax Declaration on Property Status and Income) — the calculation of an increase or decrease in unified social contribution (єдиний внесок, ЄСВ) liability amounts following the results of a documentary (tax) audit, filed per calendar year affected and per audit act. Seventh of the ten companion schedules disclosed as open backlog when the parent declaration (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3531) was authored, and seventh of those ten to be modelled, after Annex АП (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-ap, GOV-3588), Annex Ф4 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f4, GOV-3623), Annex МПЗ (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-mpz, GOV-3632), Annex Ф1 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f1, GOV-3641), Annex КІК (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-kik, GOV-3907/GOV-3996), and Annex Ф2 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f2, GOV-4002/GOV-4004). Approved within the same combined Excel template as the main declaration, by Order of the Ministry of Finance of Ukraine No. 859 of 2 October 2015, as amended by Order No. 119 of 26 February 2025 (the edition modelled here, effective for reporting periods from 1 January 2026). Published, unauthenticated, directly by the State Tax Service on tax.gov.ua as a legacy Excel (.xls) template's own dedicated 'ЄСВ 3' sheet. This v1.0.0 models the sheet in full: the taxpayer-identification header (including a second, Pension-Fund-specific passport identifier and a direct full-name field, both unique among this registry's authored UA DPS annexes), the two-value declaration-type/period header, the audit-specific identification fields (calculation year, calculation sequence number, and the audit act's own date and number), and the fixed twelve-month table (one row per calendar month, each carrying an insured-person category code, a base amount, and a resulting liability amount) plus its own total row. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Ukraine or the State Tax Service of Ukraine.

authority.name: Державна податкова служба України (State Tax Service of Ukraine)

source.documentRef: Форма Додатка ЄСВ3 до податкової декларації про майновий стан і доходи, затверджена наказом Міністерства фінансів України від 02.10.2015 № 859 (у редакції наказу від 26.02.2025 № 119), чинна з 01.01.2026 — аркуш 'ЄСВ 3'

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4010, deepening Ukraine's own disclosed Taxes backlog by authoring the seventh of ten companion schedules to ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration (GOV-3531): Annex ЄСВ3 (unified social contribution adjustment following a documentary audit), after Annex АП, Annex Ф4, Annex МПЗ, Annex Ф1, Annex КІК, and Annex Ф2. Re-fetched the same source workbook the parent declaration and all six prior annexes cite (via the Wayback Machine mirror, since tax.gov.ua itself still 403s direct sandbox fetches), confirmed byte-identical to the previously recorded sha256 (7c67f4c421a1a8fc610f9226819d223debcb56b3fd1fc3d5f75ce0247cc7f0ac) across eight cycles now. Parsed the workbook's own 'ЄСВ 3' sheet (!ref A1:CY226, 131 merges — the smallest of the four remaining unsized companion schedules (ЄСВ1: A1:CA244/241 merges, ЄСВ2: A1:CZ250/211 merges, Ф3: A1:BQ420/202 merges) sized fresh this cycle) cell-by-cell with the xlsx npm package, confirming the sheet's actual printed content ends at row 89 despite the !ref's own 226-row declared extent (rows 90-226 are blank print-area padding, the same pattern this registry's Annex Ф2 cycle found for its own sheet). Models the sheet in full: the taxpayer-identification header (including a genuinely distinct second passport-identification field for Pension Fund purposes, and a direct full-name field — both unique among this registry's seven authored UA DPS annexes), a two-value (not three-value) declarationType enum confirmed via a full non-empty-cell dump of the sheet's entire printed extent, the audit-specific identification fields, and the fixed twelve-entry (one per calendar month) repeating table plus its own total row. Both validators pass at 553/553; 9 conformance fixtures. See the Taxes vertical section below and the document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full record.

fields.name: taxpayerTaxNumberOrPassport
fields.label: Реєстраційний номер облікової картки платника податків або серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта
fields.description: The taxpayer's registration number of the taxpayer account card (RNOKPP), or — for individuals who, on religious grounds, have declined a registration number and have a corresponding notation in their passport — their passport series (if any) and number instead, matching the same either/or convention as ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration's own taxpayerTaxNumberOrPassport field.
fields.sourceRef: Rows 15-18: '1. Реєстраційний номер облікової картки платника податків або серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта (для фізичних осіб, які через свої релігійні переконання відмовляються від прийняття реєстраційного номера облікової картки платника податків та офіційно повідомили про це відповідний контролюючий орган і мають відмітку у паспорті)'

fields.name: pensionFundIdentificationPassport
fields.label: Серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта для ідентифікації платника єдиного внеску у Пенсійному фонді України
fields.description: A second, distinct identification field unique to this schedule (not present on the main declaration or any other authored companion schedule): the passport series (if any) and number used specifically to identify the unified social contribution (ЄСВ) payer within the Pension Fund of Ukraine's own records, separate from the taxpayer's RNOKPP. Footnote * (row 79) gives the expected format for passport-book holders (БКNNXXXXXX) and ID-card holders (ПХХХХХХХХХ).
fields.sourceRef: Rows 20-21: '2. Серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта для ідентифікації платника єдиного внеску у Пенсійному фонді України*'; footnote * at row 79

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Прізвище (за наявності), ім'я, по батькові (за наявності)
fields.description: The taxpayer's surname, given name, and patronymic (if any). Unlike every other authored companion schedule, this sheet requests the filer's full name directly on the annex itself rather than relying solely on the main declaration's own taxpayerFullName field — consistent with this schedule's own capacity to be filed as its own distinct calculation, potentially for a different year than the main declaration's own reporting period (see calculationYear below).
fields.sourceRef: Row 24: '3. Прізвище (за наявності), ім'я, по батькові (за наявності)'

fields.name: declarationType
fields.label: Тип декларації
fields.description: original = 'Звітна' (a regular declaration for the reporting period); revised_original = 'Звітна нова' (a new original filed to supersede a previously filed original for the same period, before the filing deadline). Unlike every other authored companion schedule (which offer a third 'corrective'/'Уточнююча' value), this sheet's own printed checkboxes offer only these two values — confirmed via a full non-empty-cell dump of the sheet's entire printed extent (rows 1-89), which found no third checkbox cell or 'Уточнююча' label anywhere. A stray 'Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється:' label fragment does appear in the row 28 header text, but corresponds to no actual input cell or checkbox on this sheet — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Row 28/31: 'Тип декларації:' — Звітна (D31:E31 checkbox, F31:J31 label) / Звітна нова (L31:M31 checkbox, N31:V31 label)

fields.name: reportingPeriodYear
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період: рік
fields.description: The calendar year in which this calculation is filed. Footnote 2 scopes this box to the same declaration types as reportingPeriodMonth below.
fields.sourceRef: Row 31, columns BY-CA: 'Звітний (податковий) період:' — рік2; footnote 2 at row 81

fields.name: reportingPeriodMonth
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період: місяць
fields.description: The calendar month number (1-12) in which this calculation is filed, per footnote 1 (row 80): filled in by individual entrepreneurs, persons engaged in independent professional activity, or members of a farming enterprise, in an 'original' or 'revised original' (not 'corrective') filing — the same cessation/period-month gating convention this registry established for ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-ap and reused for Annex Ф2, applied here to a different scope (filer category rather than cessation of business activity).
fields.sourceRef: Row 35, column BS: 'Довідкова1' — місяць; footnote 1 at row 80

fields.name: calculationYear
fields.label: Рік, за який формується розрахунок
fields.description: The tax (reporting) year whose unified social contribution (ЄСВ) obligation is being increased or decreased by this calculation, following the results of the documentary audit identified below. This is the schedule's own operative period field — distinct from reportingPeriodYear/reportingPeriodMonth above, which record only when this calculation itself is filed.
fields.sourceRef: Row 38: '5. Рік, за який формується розрахунок:'

fields.name: calculationSequenceNumber
fields.label: Номер розрахунку в декларації
fields.description: The sequential number of this calculation among possibly several ЄСВ3 calculations attached to the same declaration, per footnote 3 (row 82): a declaration may include several calculations of increase/decrease of ЄСВ obligations based on the results of a documentary audit, each with its own table specifying data separately for a given year. Corresponds to the main declaration's own appendixEsv3Count gating field (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3531).
fields.sourceRef: Row 40: 'Номер розрахунку в декларації3'; footnote 3 at row 82

fields.name: auditActDay
fields.label: Дата акта документальної перевірки: число
fields.description: The day-of-month of the documentary audit act that this calculation is based on.
fields.sourceRef: Row 43, column AR: '6. Дата акта документальної перевірки:' — число

fields.name: auditActMonth
fields.label: Дата акта документальної перевірки: місяць
fields.description: The month of the documentary audit act that this calculation is based on.
fields.sourceRef: Row 43, column BD: '6. Дата акта документальної перевірки:' — місяць

fields.name: auditActYear
fields.label: Дата акта документальної перевірки: рік
fields.description: The year of the documentary audit act that this calculation is based on.
fields.sourceRef: Row 43, column BW: '6. Дата акта документальної перевірки:' — рік

fields.name: auditActNumber
fields.label: № акта документальної перевірки
fields.description: The reference number of the documentary audit act that this calculation is based on.
fields.sourceRef: Row 47: '№ акта документальної перевірки:'

fields.name: januaryInsuredPersonCategory
fields.label: Код категорії застрахованої особи
fields.description: The category code of the insured person for this month, per the sheet's own footnote 4: collective_leased_enterprise_member = '4 – член колективного та орендного підприємства, сільськогосподарського кооперативу' (member of a collective or leased enterprise, or of an agricultural cooperative); individual_entrepreneur_general = '5 – фізична особа – підприємець на загальних підставах' (individual entrepreneur on general grounds); independent_professional = '9 – особа, яка отримує дохід від незалежної професійної діяльності' (person receiving income from independent professional activity).
fields.sourceRef: Row 65 ('Січень'), columns O-V: 'Код категорії застрахованої особи4'; footnote 4 at row 83

fields.label: Сума, з якої розраховано зобов'язання з єдиного внеску
fields.description: The amount from which the unified social contribution (ЄСВ) liability was calculated for Січень (january), as adjusted by the documentary audit.

The sheet prints no explicit summation formula for this total, so no crossFieldValidation rule ties it to the twelve monthly base amounts above — transcribed independently, consistent with this registry's established practice of reserving crossFieldValidation for relationships the source text states explicitly.
